title: StatusReport
description: POST /api/v1/hooks/status — request body sent by the gateway (status-report subcommand).

Provider.description: The editor/agent that owns a session.

SessionId.description:
Opaque session identifier.

Wraps a `String` with `#[serde(transparent)]` so the JSON wire format
stays a bare string — no migration needed for TypeScript plugins, shell
scripts, or persisted state files.

SessionStatus.description: Stored session status as reported by the client.
